Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Judge Suriel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel is a healer and the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel possesses transparent gray ghostlines running from the back of her head down to her fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel wears a seamless white uniform made of inch-thick liquid armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel's liquid armor could be mistaken for Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel possesses a meter-long shaft of blue steel weapon that she can banish to Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel's eyes contain a ring of symbols that function as tools to help her see the flow of fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel can observe target locations from a thousand kilometers away using her Presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel is a white-armored woman with green hair and ghostly lines leading from her fingertips to her skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel is a celestial messenger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel uses a sacred art to reverse time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel possesses green hair and a pale face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel has purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel's organization refers to the world as 'Cradle'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel gives Lindon a token that she can sense across worlds and beyond time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel's token is tied to Lindon with strings of fate and cannot be broken or lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel promised to provide a token to facilitate finding the individual later.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Suriel provided Lindon with visions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Suriel is a Phoenix and the Sixth Judge of the Abidan Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Suriel's Presence retrieves and transmits reports as words, images, and impressions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Suriel's designation is zero-zero-six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Suriel has the power of healing.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Suriel is a character who spoke to Lindon about his timeline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Suriel suggested how far Lindon could travel down his Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Suriel challenged Lindon to reach great heights.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has seen Suriel with his own eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Suriel is associated with the Eight-Man Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Suriel mentioned the Sword Sage to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Suriel showed Lindon a dragon beneath the sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Suriel is an Abidan who can anchor a world to order through her connection to the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Suriel is known as the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Suriel is a 'lodger' associated with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Suriel witnessed the death of an Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Suriel was familiar with the Arelius family and their ancestors.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel told Lindon he had thirty years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Suriel is a member of the Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Suriel has demonstrated absolute authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel is an Abidan who stands over the sixth division and has purple eyes and emerald hair.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel's armor is seamless and white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel possesses Suriel’s Razor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel's armor cracked during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon owes Suriel his life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Suriel showed Lindon the Sacred Valley.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Suriel reported a missing world to Makiel.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon had seen the room in Suriel's vision years before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Suriel may have sent Kiuran to remove Lindon from contention.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Suriel's visit was a significant event for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Suriel once told Lindon that all Paths can be reduced to one: improve yourself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel gave Lindon a second chance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Suriel had a vision of the future showing something gigantic tramping Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Judge Suriel is a favorite of someone mentioned by the Abidan.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel can tap into her mantle to revert a world towards a state of order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel can pass through the Way to enter an Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel's Presence can issue commands to the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Suriel showed Lindon an ending.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Suriel had a vision of the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Suriel descended from heaven to bring Lindon back from death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Suriel saw an attack that was supposed to happen in thirty years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon has memories of Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel is someone who has died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Suriel banished Li Markuth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Suriel has the power to turn back time or rewrite truth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel possesses a marble that Lindon rolls between his fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel commanded a transmission to begin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel's Presence spoke to her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel's hair is bright and vivid emerald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel's space is a projection of treasures she has collected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel is restricted by rules regarding the degree of interference she can provide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel's marble burns with a blue flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel has scripted eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel has armored fingertips.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Suriel gave Lindon a marble to facilitate finding him after or during his ascension.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Suriel possesses the Mantle of Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Suriel spends power to keep the world intact and maintain the connection between the Iteration and the Way.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Suriel can connect to the network of Abidan all over existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Suriel has ghostly gray correlation lines running from the back of her skull to her knuckles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ozmanthus Arelius had no compatibility with the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Suriel's marble contains light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Suriel is a new, young woman Ozriel had known for centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Suriel has a Presence that lives inside her mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Suriel possesses armor that flows around her and runes that spin in her eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Suriel can look into Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Suriel uses her Razor to remove toxic energy and parasites.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Suriel glimpsed the trade that would be made for Makiel's action.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Suriel intervened when the conflict between Ozriel and Makiel destabilized surrounding Iterations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon fulfilled everything Suriel promised him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Suriel has bright green hair and eyes that are bright purple rings of script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Suriel vanished in a rising tide of blue light.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel possesses Presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel transported herself to the Seat of the Accused.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel stated that something was made to detect Judges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Suriel is a Judge who has the job of repairing worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Suriel is a woman with bright green hair and a shining sword split into many branches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Suriel is a caretaker for Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Suriel is tasked with keeping Ozriel under observation and preventing him from using powers without permission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Suriel has the ability to reconstitute entire continents from nothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Suriel can tear open a rift into the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Suriel is capable of performing the work of an entire squad of lesser Phoenixes.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel is a character who floats in the emptiness over Vesper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel is a character who uses her Presence to warn of barriers and obstacles in the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Suriel's marble has a restorative aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel is the Sixth Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel's power manifests as blue, fiery wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel has runic eyes that can scan the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel is a Hound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Suriel has the ability to revive the dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Suriel is someone who might bring a miracle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Suriel is a character Ozriel mentions to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Suriel is a healer who can fight in the Void and possesses a Mantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Suriel has blue, healing fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Suriel had a vision of the Wandering Titan wading through mountains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Suriel is a Judge who rarely sits in judgment of mortals or ascended ones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Suriel might come back for Li Markuth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Suriel gave Lindon Suriel's marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Suriel can find things anywhere in any world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Suriel wears a white uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Suriel possesses a glass marble containing a single blue candle-flame.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Suriel has an opening in the Sixth Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Suriel is considered too compassionate for her own good.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Suriel is an entity that can restore lost eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has Suriel on his side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Suriel is a figure who may keep the Reaper alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael threatened to hand Cirian over to Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Suriel is a leader of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Suriel is one of the Judges and looked exasperated.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
